name: Easy Potato Latkes
recipeInstructions:
1. Empty mix package contents into large mixing bowl.
2. Sift together the dried potato shreds and flour mixture.
3. Add boiling water and mix thoroughly; blend in the eggs.
4. Let batter rest ten minutes.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Drop batter by tablespoon into pan, spreading it slightly.
7. Cover and fry until golden-brown on one side.
8. Turn and cook other side.
9. Stack finished pancakes and, if desired, keep warm in an oven set to 150°F.
10. Serve with sour cream or applesauce. Note: I didn't have any applesauce or cream, but the latkes taste fine with strawberry jam; actually, they taste quite fine even without a topping.
